titleStmt.title: SII 37.72: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 72. (A.R. No. B 411 of 1938-39.) Puṭlampalli, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Broken slab lying in front of the Donakoṇḍamma temple.
This undated epigraph may be assigned to the 16th century on the basis of palaeography.

Beginning lost. It records the gift of lands as dēvamānya, bhaṭṭavṛittimānya, reḍḍimānya, and dasavanda-mānya to several gods such as Pālakoṇḍarāya Mahādeva, Perumāḷu, Yekkilidēvi, Vināyaka Ganādhipati, Pōturaju and also several brāhamaṇās. it also records the gift of land to a brāhmaṇa for performing abhishēka in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ḷaṁ mēra paḍamaṭi muttarāju vāri A
grahāraṁ palla polamēra mēra vuttarānaku
ṁtuvāṁgu maragānu vūraṁ garaṇā
lamānyaṁ cēnu gerusugānu mēra yī cetuśīmānu polamēra gāṁgala yēpakuṁṭlapalle grā
mamaṁdali dēvamānyālu baṭṭavritti mānyā
lu pālakoṁḍarāyani yeṁdumu maḍi vinā
yaka dēvaraku tūmeṁḍu maḍi mahādēvaraku tū
meṁḍu maḍi perumāḷlaku tūmeṁḍu maḍi ye
kkali dēviki maḍi tūmeṁḍunnu Irusa pōturāju
ku maḍi tūmēṁḍu pālakoṁḍarāyaniki cēnu yi
dumu gaṇādhipatiki cēnu Irusa brāṁhaṇavriti
mānyālu vellāla liṁgayyagāriki maḍi yeṁdu
munnu cēnu yeṁdumunu mallāvōghula tiṁma
yyaku maḍi tūmeṁḍunu cēnu tūmeṁḍunnu do
Annamōllu maḍi tūmeṁḍu bayirāvōjjulaṁ
cinnayyaku maḍi tūmeṁḍu kasavarāju bādayaku
maḍumuttamunnu cēnu yiddumunnu śrīvatsagōtraṁ Ā
na sūtraṁ sōmarusu koḍukulu
laka rusuṁgāriki maḍiyeṁdu
nu Idumunnu liṁgarusuṁgāriki
padumunnu cēnu yeṁdumunnu śrī
traṁ Āśvalāyanasūtraṁ gaṁ
ḍi tiṁmmayyaku maḍi nalutumun cē
nu yiddumunnu Avubhaḷadēvuni vīrayya
ku maḍi Iddumunnu cēnu tūmeṁḍunnu Abhi
ṣēkaṁ cēśē brāṁhmani nalutumu maḍi mā
nyaṁ guḍi taṁmmaḷe ye kā
lāna Ākālāna dorakina brā
ṁhmaniki maḍi sāgiṁcci Abhi
ṣēkaṁ sēyiṁccuvāru satrā
naku vaṁḍḍe brāṁhmalaku maḍi
yaṁdumunnu cēnu yiddumunnu ce
lliṁci Āgrāmāna yettivaccē rokha
ṁvalnanu nelaku nālugēsi rūkala lekha
nu peṭṭuvāru reḍḍimānyaṁ maḍi tōṁ
mmaṁddumunnu cēnu tōṁmmaṁddunnu ka
raṇikamānyaṁ maḍi yeṁdumunnu cē
nu yeṁdumunnu dasavaṁdamānyaṁ
pū¨rvamariyāda .
Digital edition of SII 37.72 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
